title: Falcon Punch! Sparta Remix (2008 OG Remix)
description:
Here's my first Sparta Remix!

EDIT: Time has flown! I was 11 when I created this in GarageBand.

Let this remix serve as a historic reminder of how far the Sparta Remixing community has come in 17 years (as of 2026), as this was about the average skill level of a remix back then.
